chapter.arabic: بَابُ كَيْفَ كَانَ بَدْءُ الْوَحْيِ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم
chapter.english: How the Divine Revelation started to be revealed to Allah's Messenger

hadiths.arabic: إِنَّمَا الأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى

translations.en: The reward of deeds depends upon the intentions and every person will get the reward according to what he has intended.

chapter.arabic: بَابُ كَيْفَ كَانَ بَدْءُ الْوَحْيِ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم
chapter.english: How the Divine Revelation started to be revealed to Allah's Messenger

translations.en: Sometimes it is (revealed) like the ringing of a bell.
